ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the match */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "toss_winner" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss-winning team */,
  "match_result_type" TEXT /* Type of match result (e.g., win, loss, tie, no result) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the cricket team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_statistics" (
  "bowling_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the statistics were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who recorded the statistics */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled by the player */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded by the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowling_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "official_type" TEXT /* Type of official (e.g., umpire, referee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_official_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of assignment (e.g., on-field umpire, third umpire, match referee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_official_assignments_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES match_officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_official_assignments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
